narrative.headline: 2019 Subaru Ascent: electrical gripes lead, but check the powertrain and brakes too
narrative.summary: Owners filed 431 complaints with NHTSA. Electrical System dominates at 37% of reports, with Power Train (19%) and Visibility/Wiper (15%) next. A handful of reports involved fires (4 electrical, 2 engine) and crashes (3 brakes, 2 powertrain, 1 engine), and one engine report noted an injury. Use the breakdown below to know what to inspect before you buy.

issues.sample: HAVE HAD ELECTRICAL (RADIO/BLUETOOTH) ISSUES SINCE 2 WEEKS AFTER TAKING POCCESSION. BEEN IN FOR REPAIR 4 TIMES . NO RESOLVE  LOOSE STEERING IS A BIG SAFETY CONCERN.  WHILE DRIVING VEHICLE AT AN APPROX.SPEED OF 65 MPH IN WINDY CONDITIONS ON NOV.3 2018 GARDEN STATE PKWY THE WIND EN
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: The single biggest complaint area: 158 reports (37%). Four reports involved a fire, so treat any electrical glitch seriously and have it diagnosed promptly.

issues.sample: OUR ASCENT STARTED HAVING A SQUEAL AND RPM JUMP AROUND 6000 MILES. THE CAR WOULD ONLY MAKES THIS NOISE ON ACCELERATION AND WOULD CAUSE THE CAR TO LOCK UP UNTIL THE CHAIN/BELT WOULD RESEAT AND THE RPM RETURN TO NORMAL. IT THROWS NO WARNING CODES BUT HAPPENS RANDOMLY BUT SEVERAL TI
issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: The second most reported area: 82 reports (19%), including 2 tied to a crash. Watch for odd noises, RPM surges, or hesitation when accelerating on a test drive.

issues.title: Visibility/Wiper
issues.blurb: 66 reports (15%), with no crashes, fires, or injuries logged. Check the windshield against direct sunlight or oncoming lights for glare and distortion.

issues.sample: DRIVING ON FREEWAY CHECK ENGINE CAME ONLINE SUDDENLY. EYESIGHT TURNED OFF.  CAR BECAME UNSTABLE, COULD NOT GO PAST 60 MPH. KIDS IN FREKING OUT. VERY UNSAFE.  TOOK TO DEALERSHIP. THEY COULD NOT FIGURE OUT.   I DID ONLINE RESEARCH AND FOLLOWED THESE FORUMS  HTTPS://WWW.ASCENTFORUMS
issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: 47 reports (11%) and the most severe mix: 2 fires, 1 crash, and 1 injury. Take any check-engine light or sudden power loss as a real safety concern.

issues.sample: I WAS IN TRAFFIC AND THE DASH- STARTED FLASHING AND EVERYTHING AT ONCE STARTED SHUTTING OFF AND THEN BRAKE WAS APPLIED ON ITS OWN. VERY SCARY WHILE IN TRAFFIC- I HAVE BEEN WAITING FOR A TOW TRUCK FOR OVER 3 HOURS.     DIALS: AT OIL TEMP FLASHES, ALL ELECTRONIC THINGS IS ALL OFF A
issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: 26 reports (6%), but 3 are tied to a crash, so don't dismiss it. Test the brakes carefully and note any unexpected behavior or dashboard warnings.
